LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED IN PART. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $150 OF EARNINGS PER MONTHLY PAY PERIOD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. THE COURT FINDS NO BILLING STATEMENTS TO SUPPORT CLAIM OF EXEMPTION REGARDING MONTHLY MEDICAL AND DENTAL CLAIMS. COURT FINDS CLAIM OF EXEMPTION APPEARS EXCESSIVE. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ANGELA BRADSTREET; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR NO. 12353, EMAIL: MVISCIO@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is DENIED in part. The Court orders that the levying officer is directed to release $150 of earnings per monthly pay period to the judgment creditor for payment of the judgment. The Court finds no billing statements to support claim of exemption regarding monthly medical and dental claims. Court finds claim of exemption appears excessive. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

NOT REPORTED: Judgment debtor, Kemet Bender appears late and is informed of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR No. 12353, email: mviscio@sftc.org. (D302)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

Having reviewed the papers and there being no opposition, the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of KEMET BENDER is GRANTED. The earnings held by the levying officer, in the amount of $941.92 are ordered released to the judgment debtor. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)
